"'''Uhl Eharl Khoehng'''" is a short story written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]]. It was originally printed in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]] which was published by [[West End Games]] in November 1995 and later reprinted in the short story anthology ''[[Tales from the New Republic]]'' which was published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in December 1999 and was also made available online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. It prominently features a fictional play called the [[Uhl Eharl Khoehng (play)|''Uhl Eharl Khoehng'']].

==Plot summary==
Haunted by terrifying [[Force vision/Legends|visions]] of her nemesis [[Vialco]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and fledging [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Fable Astin/Legends|Fable Astin]] arrives on [[Trulalis]], seeking training in self-defense. She tracks down the reclusive [[Adalric Brandl]], an [[Actor/Legends|actor]] and former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] who has fallen out of favor with the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]]. Fable trains under Adalric, learning difficult [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] skills while avoiding the temptations of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. When Fable begins a romantic relationship with Adalric's son, [[Jaalib Brandl|Jaalib]], however, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|dark mentor]] becomes incensed and warns Fable to keep her distance. 

Fable's enemy, the Inquisitor Vialco, confronts her on Trulalis, and with her newfound skills she is able to [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] the dark warrior to a standstill. Using a [[Dopplegänger|Force illusion]], Adalric tricks Fable into [[Death/Legends|killing]] Vialco and then attempts to trap Fable on Trulalis by destroying her [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. He offers her power and even access to his son in exchange for her servitude on the dark side, but she refuses. Jaalib helps her escape Trulalis, even though he risks the wrath of his [[Parent/Legends|father]].
